purpose: compact proof that the executor keeps pull provenance, push staging, and browser ingress on one production-shaped topology

pull_pipeline.exporter: scans the merge base and coverage evidence
pull_pipeline.importer: persists the base package as immutable provenance

pull_to_push_mapping.exporter: scans the merge base and coverage evidence
pull_to_push_mapping.importer: persists the base package as immutable provenance
pull_to_push_mapping.preflight: binds that persisted base package to the live remote identity and a short-lived session
pull_to_push_mapping.snapshot_hashes: lists the live remote comparison set for planning only
pull_to_push_mapping.dry_run: uploads the canonical plan as eligibility evidence and returns a receipt, not a lock
pull_to_push_mapping.apply: revalidates fresh live evidence before every batch and again at the storage boundary
pull_to_push_mapping.journal: reads durable evidence without authorizing mutation
pull_to_push_mapping.recovery_inspect: starts with inspect and classifies finish, rollback, retry, or block without mutation
pull_to_push_mapping.recovery: allows mutating repair only when the journal row, lease fence, and fresh live hashes prove the action

push_pipeline.preflight: binds the persisted pull base to the live remote identity and a short-lived push session
push_pipeline.snapshot_hashes: returns the live remote comparison set for planning only and never acts as write authority
push_pipeline.dry_run: uploads the canonical plan as eligibility evidence and returns a receipt, not a lock
push_pipeline.apply: revalidates fresh live evidence before every batch and again at the storage boundary
push_pipeline.journal: reads durable evidence without authorizing mutation
push_pipeline.recovery_inspect: starts with inspect and classifies finish, rollback, retry, or block without mutation
push_pipeline.recovery: allows mutating repair only when the journal row, lease fence, and fresh live hashes prove the action

proof: one private network
remote-base and remote-changed are the same remote identity at different times
push preflight binds the persisted pull base to the live remote identity
push snapshot hashes stay planning-only
push dry-run returns a receipt, not a lock
push batch apply revalidates live evidence before every batch and at the storage boundary
push journal remains read-only before mutating recovery
push recovery inspect happens before any mutating repair
dry-run and apply are separate remote operations
push preflight mints one short-lived session bound to the persisted base and live remote identity
browser-visible inspection goes through the sandbox-provided 8080 ingress
separate disposable blueprints
remote-base and remote-changed are the same remote identity at different times
push preflight binds the persisted pull base to the live remote identity
push snapshot hashes stay planning-only
push dry-run returns a receipt, not a lock
push batch apply revalidates live evidence before every batch and at the storage boundary
push journal remains read-only before mutating recovery
push recovery inspect happens before any mutating repair
push preflight, dry-run, apply, journal, and recovery use the same route names as Docker
browser-visible inspection goes through the sandbox-provided 8080 ingress

required_invariants: dry-run and apply are separate remote operations
remote snapshot hash listing is planning evidence, not write authority
dry-run is a receipt, not a lock
apply must revalidate the live remote before every batch and at the storage boundary
journal inspection is read-only and never authorizes mutation by itself
recovery must begin with inspect before any mutating repair
push preflight must mint a short-lived session bound to one remote identity and one persisted pull base
authentication must be at least as strict as current Reprint HMAC usage
pull exporter/importer establish the immutable base package before any push stage runs
pull exporter/importer are the provenance source for push preflight, dry-run, apply, journal, and recovery
